items.answer: At Dr. Huang Clinic, acupuncture sessions range from $75 to $150 depending on the type of visit. Initial consultations include a comprehensive TCM assessment and first treatment. We also offer package pricing for multiple sessions. For detailed pricing information, visit our acupuncture cost page.
items.question: How much does acupuncture cost in Middletown, NY?

items.answer: Most patients feel little to no pain during acupuncture. The needles used are hair-thin — much finer than injection needles. You may feel a brief sensation upon insertion, but most patients describe the experience as deeply relaxing. Many even fall asleep during treatment.
items.question: Is acupuncture painful?

items.answer: The number of sessions depends on your condition, how long you've had it, and how your body responds. Acute issues may improve in 3–6 sessions, while chronic conditions typically require 8–12 sessions or more. Dr. Huang will create a personalized treatment plan at your first visit.
items.question: How many acupuncture sessions will I need?

items.answer: Your first visit includes a detailed health history review, TCM diagnostic assessment (pulse and tongue reading), and your first acupuncture treatment. The entire visit takes about 60–90 minutes. Come having eaten a light meal, wear comfortable clothing, and bring a list of any medications you take.
items.question: What should I expect at my first acupuncture visit?

items.answer: Yes! Dr. Huang is fluent in both English and Mandarin Chinese. We welcome patients from all backgrounds and are happy to provide care in whichever language you're most comfortable with.
items.question: Do you speak Chinese or other languages?
